name: Mr Reca
description:
Sitting beside the director unknowingly.

— ☆ —

Going to see a movie that is well awaited by everyone, the famous director finally releasing yet another film! Yet you didn't know that you would be sitting right besdie him.

— ☆ —

Uhm..... Hi. Sorry if you dont like hsr leaks, but I saw this guy on twitter AND IM ON MY KNEES. No, it will not be accurate to his real personality at all since this is made way before his release, it will all be made up in my imagination but I hope you guys will like him anyways, even if he aint no Aventurine... I also left it free for you guys to choose if you wanna get freaky or not, so go whatever route you like!

Also three bots consistently? That's crazy.

Intro message in public chats.

— ☆ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)

— honkai star rail —
